🍎 Nokia 7360 ISAM - Comandos

← Voltar Vendors 📄 Documentação
Uplink Down
show alarm query ihub-link all
Potência Óptica (PON/SFP)
show alarm query sfprssi all
show pon optics
show pon optics 1/1/3/1
show alarm query olt-gen all
Visualizar e Localizar ONTs
show equipment ont
show pon unprovision-onu
show equipment ont index sn: [SERIAL_AQUI]
show equipment ont status pon | match exact: [DESCRICAO]
Diagnóstico Detalhado ONT
show equipment ont status pon ont 1/1/1/1/1
show equipment ont optics 1/1/1/1/1
show equipment ont interface 1/1/1/1/1 detail
Troubleshoot de Quedas
show alarm query ont-ploam all
show alarm query name ont-ploam-dying-gasp
show alarm query name ont-ploam-sig-degrade
Sistema e Hardware
show equipment temperature
show system cpu-load
show system memory-usage
show core1-uptime
